title: epipactis levantina
intro: Epipactis levantina, also known as Levantine helleborine, is a type of orchid native to the Mediterranean region, specifically in the countries surrounding the Levant Sea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Epipactis levantina include reducing cough and congestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Epipactis levantina can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
